= [[Domain]] =
Icons that are mainly used in Domains.

= Moons =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Beast Moon}}||[[Koryeon Domain]]
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Sword Moon}}||[[Yamato Domain]]
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Dragon Moon}}||[[Cathay Domain]]
{{IconExampleRowWithText|War Moon}}||[[Murikan Domain]]
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Thunder Moon}}||[[Britland Domain]]
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Nether Moon}}||[[Kemetic Domain]]
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Arcane Moon}}||[[Hellenic Domain]]
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Cyclops Moon}}||[[Cyclops Domain]]
|}

= [[Koryeon Domain]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Energy Core (Koryeon Domain)}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Nebula Detector}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Prison Cell Key}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Rocket Up Blueprint}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Soldier Manual}}
|}

= [[Yamato Domain]] =

= [[Cathay Domain]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Adv. Rocket Blueprint}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Prison Cage Key}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Wormhole Device}}
|}

= [[Murikan Domain]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Ghostfire Blueprint|orange}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Jaden Spear Blueprint}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|War Weapon Tech}}
|}

= [[Britland Domain]] =
{{IconExampleHeader}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Anti-Gachi Jet Oil}}
{{IconExampleRowWithText|Ghost Ship Figurehead}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Matrix Motherboard}}
{{IconExampleRowWithLink|Pyramid Card}}
|}

[[Category:Domains]]
[[Category:Icons]]
